params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitions
params.description: Comma-separated list of definition IDs to filter builds

params.name: buildNumber
params.description: Filter builds by build number

params.name: statusFilter
params.description: Filter builds by status

params.name: resultFilter
params.description: Filter builds by result

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of builds to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: branchName
params.description: Filter builds by branch name

params.name: reasonFilter
params.description: Filter builds by trigger reason

params.name: requestedFor
params.description: Filter builds requested by a specific user (email or descriptor)

items.docs: Returns a list of builds for the project. Supports filtering by definition, build number, status, result, and branch. Results can be paginated using continuationToken.

info.name: Azure DevOps Queue a new build

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: ignoreWarnings
params.description: Ignore warnings when queuing the build

params.name: checkInTicket
params.description: Check-in ticket for gated check-in builds

items.docs: Queues a new build by specifying the build definition and optional parameters such as source branch, build parameters, and demands. The build will be scheduled and executed based on agent availability.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific build, including its status, result, timing, source information, and links to logs and artifacts.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build to delete

items.docs: Deletes a build record and its associated data, including logs and artifacts. This operation cannot be undone. The build must not be in progress to be deleted.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Returns the list of log entries for a build. Each log entry corresponds to a step or phase in the build pipeline. Use the log ID to retrieve the content of a specific log.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Returns the detailed timeline for a build, showing all phases, jobs, tasks, and their individual statuses, start times, and durations. Useful for understanding which steps in the pipeline passed or failed.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

params.name: artifactName
params.description: Filter by a specific artifact name

items.docs: Returns a list of artifacts published by a specific build. Artifacts can be downloaded individually and include their name, type, and download URL.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: name
params.description: Filter definitions by name (supports wildcards with *)

params.name: path
params.description: Filter definitions by folder path

params.name: builtAfter
params.description: Return definitions that were built after this date

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of definitions to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

items.docs: Returns a list of build definitions (pipelines) in the project. Supports filtering by name and path, and returns summary information for each definition.

info.name: Azure DevOps Create a build definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionToCloneId
params.description: ID of an existing definition to clone

params.name: definitionToCloneRevision
params.description: Revision number of the definition to clone

items.docs: Creates a new build definition (pipeline) in the project. The definition specifies the build steps, triggers, variables, and agent requirements.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a build definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build definition

params.name: revision
params.description: Specific revision number to retrieve

params.name: minMetricsTime
params.description: Minimum date for including build metrics

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific build definition, including all steps, triggers, variables, and configuration. You can also request a specific revision of the definition.

info.name: Azure DevOps Update a build definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build definition to update

params.name: secretsSourceDefinitionId
params.description: ID of the definition to clone secrets from

params.name: secretsSourceDefinitionRevision
params.description: Revision number to clone secrets from

items.docs: Replaces an existing build definition with the provided definition. The revision number in the body must match the current revision to prevent concurrent modification conflicts.

info.name: Azure DevOps Delete a build definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build definition to delete

items.docs: Deletes a build definition. All associated builds must be deleted first, or you must specify deleteBuilds=true to cascade delete all associated builds.
